title: • - [ ] **Community engagement**:
content:
• - [ ] **Community engagement**:
  • - Use GitHub Discussions for brainstorming and Q&A.
  • - Recognize contributors and encourage open-source participation.

  • ---

  • ### **8. Blind Spots and Shatter Points**
  • - **Blind Spots**:
  • - Lack of visibility into third-party services or dependencies.
  • - Insufficient test coverage for edge cases.
  • - Over-reliance on specific team membe
context: From document: full best practices house keeping; — chunk 24 (chunk 24/24)
